_schema_note: Section-level visibility: profile=public; orders, open_issues, last_contact, notes=operational. Field-level visibility lives inside contract_terms. visibility values: public | operational | economic.

items.summary: Requested updated bio-content certification for FW26 marketing claims

last_contact.summary: They want certification paperwork ahead of a press moment and asked whether Sable Clair can stay exclusive through SS27.

sample_obligations.value: 2 pre-production samples per colorway, supplier cost

sustainability_clause.value: Certified bio-based inputs, annual third-party audit rights for the buyer

exclusivity.value: Exclusive rights to the Sable Clair colorway for 18 months

late_delivery_penalty.value: 2% of PO value per week late, capped at 12%

items.text: Sustainability story is central to this account. Have the certification status ready for every call.
They move slower on approvals but rarely renegotiate price once set.
